name: audit-pack-emit json bundle includes both commit and generated_at fields populated from the CLI args per §2.24
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack-emit.sh" --format json --commit-sha abc123 --generated-at 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z --out-dir out 2>err.txt && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z/bundle.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.commit==="abc123"&&j.generated_at==="2026-05-25T00:00:00Z"?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
